name: unicode_a7dc_literal_nested_map_value
description: Nested surface: literal ƛ (U+019B) as a map<string, literal> VALUE. Input {"k":"Ƛ"} folds U+A7DC→U+019B for the value, claiming {"k":ƛ}. #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
